subcodes.title: Words spoken at Baltimore Hotel in Paris, 1913-05-13
subcodes.first_line: In this Cause of God there is no secret doctrine or secret society or club or gathering. I want you to be impressed with the importance of this fact that there is no secret doctrine in this Cause at all.
subcodes.first_line_orig: در امرالله محفل سری نباید باشد و لو امروز نفوسی بیغرض و خالص این محفل را تأسیس مینمایند
subcodes.subjects: @secret societies, @empty learning; false spirituality, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @contention and conflict
